boxDescription:
The fuse panel is located in the passenger’s footwell. Remove the panel cover to access the fuses.
To remove the fuse panel cover, pull the panel toward you. When the clips of the panel disengage, let the panel fall easily.
To remove a fuse use the fuse puller tool provided on the fuse panel cover.

boxDescription: The power distribution box is located in the engine compartment. The power distribution box contains high-current fuses that protect your vehicle’s main electrical systems from overloads.
If your vehicle is equipped with this option, there will also be a relay box located on the driver side end of the instrument panel. See your authorized dealer for service. The relays are coded.
